intake.user_request: Build computed visualization datasets from index.json and graph.json for the dashboard Intelligence tab. Produce treemap hierarchy, scatter coordinates (complexity vs coverage), sankey layer-flow aggregations, and UMAP 2D projection of RAG vectors. Output as static JSON files the dashboard can fetch and render directly.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Pure data-transform task: read existing .coderef artifacts, compute derived JSON, write 5 output files. No new APIs, no schema changes, no blast-radius risk. Deterministic classifier: single-bounded output scope → light.

errors: No layer data present in current index.json — elements lack layer/capability fields. Viz transforms will use file-path heuristics as layer proxy.

in_scope: Write treemap.json — nested hierarchy by file/element, value=complexity from complexity summary, color=element.type, coverage=tested boolean from coverage.json
Write scatter.json — flat array per element with complexity + tested fields
Write sankey.json — edge aggregations by source-file-dir → target-file-dir from graph.json edges
Write umap.json — PCA 2D projection of coderef-vectors.json (768-dim), fallback since umap-js unavailable on server
Write hotspots.json — top 50 elements by usedBy count (in-degree from index.json)
out_of_scope: Dashboard UI code (owned by Instance 1 / dispatch-009)
Building an HTTP server or data API (dispatch-009)
Adding layer/capability fields to the scanner

constraints: No layer field in current index.json — use element type as color dimension proxy
umap-js not available — use PCA fallback for 2D projection
1153 of 2431 elements have RAG vectors — umap.json covers vectorized elements only
Output must be static JSON files, not an HTTP endpoint
